office_does: The commissioner oversees the public utility district's budget, infrastructure, rates, and utility services.
race_blurb: Appointed incumbent Jim Campbell faces Troy Kirby and Bruce D. Wilkinson Jr. in a race centered on water reliability, infrastructure, rates, and utility scope.

candidates.summary: Wilkinson is a nonprofit and political organizer focused on affordable water, aquifer planning, and a larger public-utility role.
highlights: Supports safe, reliable, affordable water and long-term aquifer planning [S1]
Supports a larger public-utility role as a check on private electric rates [S1]

candidates.summary: Campbell is the appointed commissioner and former PUD field-operations director focused on infrastructure, maintenance, drinking-water safety, and stable rates.
highlights: Has utility governance and technical-management experience [S1][S2]
Prioritizes preventive maintenance, rate stability, and cost review [S1]

candidates.summary: Kirby is a former parks commissioner who supports grants, infrastructure investment, customer assistance, aquifer protection, and open meetings.
highlights: Supports grants and polluter settlements to limit customer costs [S1]
Calls for preventive maintenance, backup power, regional planning, and open meetings [S1]
